all.en: I had just downloaded a new dating app last weekend out of curiosity.
all.zh: 上個週末我出於好奇剛下載了一款新的交友軟體。

all.en: After swiping for an hour, I finally matched with someone named Daniel.
all.zh: 滑了一小時後，我終於和一位叫丹尼爾的人配對成功。

all.en: His profile said he loved hiking, jazz music, and homemade pasta.
all.zh: 他的個人檔案寫著他熱愛健行、爵士樂和手工義大利麵。

all.en: I sent him a simple hello and asked about his favorite trail.
all.zh: 我傳了一句簡單的哈囉，並問他最喜歡的健行路線。

all.en: He replied within minutes, which made me feel more confident.
all.zh: 他幾分鐘內就回覆了，讓我覺得更有信心。

all.en: We chatted about our hometowns and our jobs for almost two hours.
all.zh: 我們聊了將近兩個小時，談到家鄉和工作。

all.en: He seemed polite, funny, and not too eager to ask for personal details.
all.zh: 他似乎有禮貌又風趣，也沒有急著問私人細節。

all.en: At the end, he suggested grabbing coffee at a quiet café downtown.
all.zh: 最後他提議去市中心一家安靜的咖啡廳喝杯咖啡。

all.en: I said yes but chose a public place to feel safe.
all.zh: 我答應了，但選了一個公共場所讓自己比較安心。

all.en: After we said goodnight, I sat smiling at my phone for a while.
all.zh: 互道晚安後，我對著手機微笑了好一陣子。

all.en: Maybe online dating was not as scary as I had imagined.
all.zh: 也許網路交友並沒有我想像中那麼可怕。

all.en: On Saturday afternoon, I arrived at the café fifteen minutes earlier than planned.
all.zh: 星期六下午，我比約定時間提早十五分鐘抵達咖啡廳。

all.en: Daniel walked in wearing a navy sweater and a slightly nervous, friendly smile.
all.zh: 丹尼爾走進來，穿著深藍色毛衣，臉上帶著一絲緊張卻友善的微笑。

all.en: We ordered lattes and chocolate cake while choosing a table by the window.
all.zh: 我們點了拿鐵和巧克力蛋糕，並選了一張靠窗的桌子。

all.en: The conversation flowed easily, and three hours passed without either of us noticing.
all.zh: 談話流暢自然，三個小時過去了，我們兩個都沒察覺。

all.en: He showed me photos of a recent hike to a waterfall outside the city.
all.zh: 他給我看了最近一次到城外瀑布健行的照片。

all.en: I told him about my collection of vintage cookbooks from my grandmother's kitchen.
all.zh: 我向他介紹了我從祖母廚房繼承的復古食譜書收藏。

all.en: Before leaving, he asked if I would like to go hiking together next weekend.
all.zh: 離開前，他問我下週末要不要一起去健行。

all.en: I agreed, suggesting an easy trail since I was clearly the less experienced one.
all.zh: 我答應了，並建議走一條簡單的步道，畢竟我顯然是經驗較少的那位。

all.en: That night, I told my best friend every small detail of our meeting.
all.zh: 那晚，我把我們見面的每個小細節都告訴了我最好的朋友。

all.en: Maybe a quiet coffee date could really be the start of something special.
all.zh: 或許一場安靜的咖啡約會，真的能成為一段特別關係的開始。

all.en: The following Saturday, Daniel and I met at the trailhead with backpacks and sunscreen.
all.zh: 接下來那個星期六，我和丹尼爾在登山口會合，帶著背包和防曬乳。

all.en: He patiently taught me how to pace myself on the gentle uphill sections.
all.zh: 他耐心地教我如何在緩坡路段控制步伐。

all.en: We stopped at a small wooden bridge to take photos of the rushing stream below.
all.zh: 我們在一座小木橋上停下，為下方湍急的溪水拍照。

all.en: At the summit, Daniel surprised me with a thermos of homemade pumpkin soup.
all.zh: 抵達山頂時，丹尼爾拿出一壺自製南瓜湯給我，讓我又驚又喜。

all.en: We shared stories about our childhoods while watching clouds drift across the valley.
all.zh: 我們一邊看著雲朵飄過山谷，一邊分享童年的故事。

all.en: On the way down, he held my hand carefully over the slippery rocky parts.
all.zh: 下山時，他在濕滑的石頭路段小心地牽著我的手。

all.en: By sunset, we were already planning a longer overnight hike for the following month.
all.zh: 到了日落時分，我們已在規劃下個月一趟更長的過夜健行。

all.en: My best friend smiled knowingly when she heard the excitement in my voice.
all.zh: 我最好的朋友聽到我聲音中的興奮，會心地笑了。

all.en: Three months later, Daniel met my parents over a quiet Sunday family dinner.
all.zh: 三個月後，丹尼爾在一頓安靜的星期天家庭晚餐中見了我的父母。

all.en: What had started as a simple swipe had grown into a relationship full of laughter.
all.zh: 從一次簡單的滑動開始，竟發展成一段充滿歡笑的感情。

all.en: Six months after our first match, Daniel invited me to meet his closest friends.
all.zh: 我們配對成功的六個月後，丹尼爾邀請我認識他最要好的朋友們。

all.en: We gathered at a cozy Italian restaurant where his roommate worked as head chef.
all.zh: 我們在一家溫馨的義大利餐廳聚餐，他的室友在那裡擔任主廚。

all.en: His friends welcomed me warmly and shared embarrassing childhood stories about Daniel all evening.
all.zh: 他的朋友熱情地歡迎我，整晚分享丹尼爾尷尬的童年趣事。

all.en: I laughed until my cheeks hurt and felt completely accepted by his close circle.
all.zh: 我笑到臉頰發疼，並感受到自己被他親密的朋友圈完全接納。

all.en: The next month, Daniel and I adopted a gentle older rescue dog named Biscuit.
all.zh: 下個月，我和丹尼爾領養了一隻溫和的年長救援犬，名叫餅乾。

all.en: Biscuit loved hiking and slowly became part of our every weekend outdoor adventure.
all.zh: 餅乾喜愛健行，漸漸成為我們每個週末戶外探險的一份子。

all.en: My grandmother knitted a tiny sweater for Biscuit when winter winds arrived in November.
all.zh: 十一月寒風來襲時，祖母為餅乾織了一件小巧的毛衣。

all.en: Daniel proposed during a quiet sunrise hike at the very trail where we began.
all.zh: 丹尼爾在我們最初相約的那條步道上，於寧靜的日出時分向我求婚。

all.en: I said yes with tears, surrounded by mountains, soft mist, and chirping morning birds.
all.zh: 我含淚答應，四周是群山、輕霧和清晨啁啾的鳥鳴。

all.en: What had started with a single curious swipe had bloomed into a beautiful life.
all.zh: 從一次出於好奇的滑動開始，竟綻放成了一段美好的人生。
